title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Federal Reserve Payments Study (FR 3066; OMB No. 7100-0351).
action: On July 30, 2024, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (89 FR 61116) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 3066. The comment period for this notice expired on September 30, 2024. The Board received one comment.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Federal Register > Notice > 2025-00482
title_normalized: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
bm25_text: 2025-00482 Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB On July 30, 2024, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (89 FR 61116) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 3066. The comment period for this notice expired on September 30, 2024. The Board received one comment. The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Federal Reserve Payments Study (FR 3066; OMB No. 7100-0351).
